_comment: Copy into <project>/.logscope/config.json and edit. Full reference: doc/CONFIG.md. Keys starting with _ are comments.

sources._comment: Optional second input on the same timeline — read-only file tail.
sources.name: server

_comment_parsers: Omit for auto (all built-in presets). See doc/CONFIG.md for the preset table, or use custom regex `rules`.
_comment_commands: Aliases for `logscope run <name>`. {device}/{baud} substitute from the live source when detachPort is set.
_comment_flash: Device-specific: `logscope flash` runs this script (contract in .logscope/scripts/README.md). Delete this key if flashing is not a thing you do over serial.
